title: A Covenant Forever

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A D G A)
Let us sing of ancient stories,
Of power, of wonder, of glory.
Passed through ages, a tale so grand,
The works of His mighty hand.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A G F#m D)
We will not hide the truth of old,
From children born and hearts yet bold.
Declare His strength, His wondrous name,
His justice that burns, His holy flame.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (A E F#m D)
Let hearts remember, let voices rise,
To tell the tale of skies and cries.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (A D G A)
From the heavens to the land,
A covenant made, His guiding hand.
Faithful through the storm and plight,
He led His people by fire and light.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A G F#m D)
Mountains split and waters roared,
He rained down bread, His blessings poured.
He turned the stone to rivers deep,
A shepherd strong, His promise to keep.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (A F#m Bm E)
Yet hearts rebelled, their paths astray,
Still, He forgave and made a way.
His anger burned, His mercy shone,
A King of justice on the throne.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (A D G A)
From the heavens to the land,
A covenant made, His guiding hand.
Faithful through the storm and plight,
He led His people by fire and light.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A G D A)
Let us sing of ancient stories,
Of power, of wonder, of glory.
Till the stars no longer shine,
The covenant remains divine.

epigraph: We will not hide them from their children
